_comment: SWEF v1.0.0-rc1 — Google Play Store submission template. Complete all fields in the Play Console before submitting for review.

metadata.shortDescription: Fly from your real GPS location to the edge of space in stunning 3D.

en-US.fullDescription:
Take off from your real-world GPS location and fly through stunning photorealistic 3D terrain powered by Google Photorealistic Tiles and Cesium for Unity.

Skywalking: Earth Flight lets you soar from your backyard to the edge of space — through troposphere, stratosphere, and the Kármán line — in a single seamless flight.

★ KEY FEATURES ★
✈ GPS-accurate takeoff from your real location
🌍 Photorealistic 3D terrain via Google Maps Tiles
🤖 ARIA AI Co-Pilot: smart flight advisor
🌦 Dynamic weather: clouds, wind, storms
🌅 Full 24-hour day/night cycle
🗼 ATC radio and ILS approach
🏆 Battle Pass with seasonal challenges
👥 Multiplayer formation flying
📷 Photo Mode with drone camera
🎖 100+ achievements
💻 PC, Android, Android Tablet — play anywhere
en-US.releaseNotes:
Version 1.0.0 — Launch Release!
• All 100+ feature systems complete
• GPS-accurate takeoff from your real location
• ARIA AI Co-Pilot assistant
• Battle Pass Season 1: Sky Pioneer
• Full multi-platform support

ja-JP.fullDescription: あなたのGPS位置から宇宙の端まで飛ぼう。
ja-JP.releaseNotes: バージョン1.0.0 — 正式リリース！

ko-KR.fullDescription: 내 GPS 위치에서 우주 끝까지 날아가보세요.

zh-CN.fullDescription: 从您的GPS位置起飞，一路飞向太空边缘。

required.name: android.permission.INTERNET
required.reason: Cesium 3D tile streaming and multiplayer connectivity.

required.name: android.permission.ACCESS_NETWORK_STATE
required.reason: Detect offline state for graceful fallback.

required.name: android.permission.VIBRATE
required.reason: Haptic feedback for flight events and notifications.

required.name: android.permission.CAMERA
required.reason: In-flight photo mode and augmented reality features.

required.name: android.permission.RECORD_AUDIO
required.reason: Voice commands and in-flight multiplayer voice chat.

removedOrNotNeeded.name: android.permission.WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE
removedOrNotNeeded.reason: Not needed on API 29+; save data written to app-private directory.

removedOrNotNeeded.name: android.permission.READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE
removedOrNotNeeded.reason: Not needed; media read via MediaStore on API 29+.

assetChecklist.icon_512x512: TODO: Export 512×512 px PNG, no rounded corners applied (Play Store applies them).
assetChecklist.featureGraphic_1024x500: TODO: Create 1024×500 px JPEG/PNG key art. No status bar or device frame.
assetChecklist.screenshots_phone_min2: TODO: At least 2 screenshots at 1080×1920 px or higher (16:9 or 9:16).
